claim: The stagnation-frozen-pathology coding may understate the active sacrificial demands the North Korean order continues to place on its population — the Juche ideology's demands for collective self-reliance, loyalty sacrifice, and military-first mobilization suggest ongoing sacrificial dynamics rather than mere stagnation.
rationale: Stagnation implies the sacred political order is static and neither escalating nor correcting; but North Korea exhibits continuous low-level sacrificial mobilization and periodic escalatory gestures (nuclear testing, military provocations) that suggest the order is better coded as frozen-pathology with active sacrificial maintenance rather than simple stagnation.
